subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! One among My servants who hath turned toward My horizon, hearkened unto My call and voiced My praise, hath made mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد ذکرک احد من عبادی الذی اقبل الی افقی و سمع ندائی و نطق بثنائی انه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @predictions and prophecies, @chastisement and requital
